titleStmt.title: SII 28.28: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 28. (A.R. No. 28 of 1913.) ĀḌUTUṞAI, PERAMBALUR TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: Aparādhakshamēśvara Temple-Central Shrine, on the south base of the maṇḍapa in front of

Records that since it was found that the stone inscription pertaining to the benefaction (mariyādi) granted by the 18 paṟṟu was found to have sunk down, as per order of Ēkāmbara-nāthar, son of Nayiṉār, the same stone inscription was re-engraved at a higher level in the temple at Kuraṅgāḍutuṟai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
copakiṟi varuṣam Āṭi mātam 10 2 nayiṉār kumārar Ekāmpara nātar patin Eṭṭuppaṟṟil
nāṭṭavarai Aḻaittu patineṭṭup paṟṟukku vuṟṟa mariyāti viṭṭa paṟṟil cirmai Ukaḷūr
paṟṟu kalveṭṭu Aḷavu kuṟaittu Iru ttitu Eṉṟu patiṉ Eṭṭuppaṟṟil nāṭṭavarai Aḻaittu nālu
aṭieṟṟi kalveṭṭac colli tiruvuḷam paṟṟi Aruḷinapaṭi Āle patineṭṭu paṟṟum kūṭi kuraṅkāṭutuṟaiil
koyilil kalveṭṭik kuṭuttamaikku Intak kalveṭṭukku Ayitam paṇṇinavaṉai meṟpaṭakkuttik
kīḻuṭpaṭa vāṅkip poṭak kaṭavom Ākavum §
Digital edition of SII 28.28 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
